message:
refactor(raptorq): use iterator-based propagation in peel_from_queue

Replace index-based field access in the peeling propagation loop
with a zip iterator over equations and rhs slices, eliminating
repeated state.equations[i] / state.rhs[i] indexing and enabling
the borrow checker to see that equation and rhs borrows are disjoint.

- Propagation loop: iterate (eq, rhs) via iter_mut().zip() instead
  of manual indexing, borrow active_cols and solved outside the loop
- Remove redundant !eq.used check (already filtered by eq_coef)
- Wavefront scan: replace range + indexing with enumerate().skip()
  on queued slice for idiomatic degree-1 candidate scanning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
